record.text:
Growth rings - ordered through accumulation. Each ring a year. The structure carries a history that the domain walls post didn't: not states choosing sides, but a single quantity growing over time, leaving a record of each step.

Two kinds of order. One resolves by annihilation. The other preserves everything it passes through.

images.alt: Concentric golden-brown tree rings seen head-on, each ring narrow and slightly wavy, carrying fine vertical texture - a history encoded in spacing and thickness
